title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at AU Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at AU Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with AU Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About AU Small Finance Bank:
AU Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank!
